motion: Merge PR #99 — chore: T2 — HTTP/SSE bridge (Go side). Third council review (v3).

fixes.description: Add TestSendInput_EmptyKeys_WithSubstrate — construct bridge with a terminal.Substrate stub via WithSubstrate(...), POST /api/agents/{id}/input with {"keys": ""}, assert HTTP 400 with "keys is required". Must exercise handlers.go:200-206.

Fix misleading log at main.go:87 — remove "(localhost only)" parenthetical which is inaccurate when BRIDGE_ADDR overrides the default loopback binding. Replace with: "HTTP bridge: no BRIDGE_API_KEY set — running without auth"

pr_amendments: Note that TestSendInput_EmptyKeys_WithSubstrate was added per v3 council review
Note that the log message at main.go:87 was corrected per v3 council review
